title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kubernetes.io/hostname
text:
Type: Label
Example:
kubernetes.io/hostname: "ip-172-20-114-199.ec2.internal"
Used on: Node
The Kubelet populates this label with the hostname of the node. Note that the hostname
can be changed from the "actual" hostname by passing the
--hostname-override
flag to
the
kubelet
.
This label is also used as part of the topology hierarchy.
See
topology.kubernetes.io/zone
for more information.
